name: agentic-sdlc-codex-plugin
description: A Codex plugin for contract-driven delivery, verified assessments, and visual project lineage.

interface.shortDescription: Project context and verified assessments for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agentic SDLC helps Codex understand an existing software project, agree work in plain language, produce and verify real artifacts, and open a local Change Observatory that explains requests, decisions, contracts, changes, and delivery lineage.
defaultPrompt: Contextualize this project and prepare an initial technical assessment.
Assess this project's architecture, risks, and priorities.
Open the Change Observatory and explain this project's recorded delivery lineage.
